stemHtml: METAR: LPPT 150505Z 11006KT 9999 BKN016 M09/M16 Q1006 NOSIG. Which interpretation is correct?

options.a: Temperature is 16° below ISA, visibility 10 km+, QNH 1006.
options.b: Temperature minus 9°C, report time 15:05 PM, 5-7/8 cloud at 1600 ft.
options.c: Report at 05:05 UTC, dew point minus 16°C, QNH 1006 hPa.
options.d: Wind 110° true, QNH 9 hPa less than standard, no significant change.
